description: A worker dropped a tool from scaffolding, but no one was injured. A safety officer needs to log this as a 'near-miss' to prevent future occurrences.

nodes.task_description: Create a new safety incident report.

expected_outcome.value: A new report form is generated.

nodes.task_description: Describe the event and classify the incident as 'Near-Miss'.

expected_outcome.value: The report is correctly filled out and classified.

nodes.task_description: Recommend a corrective action: 'Hold a toolbox talk on tool tethering for all crews working at height.'

expected_outcome.value: A relevant, preventative corrective action is recommended.
